mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS username, u.sex AS sex, u.following_count AS followingCount, u.follower_count AS followerCount FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN t_user_follow uf ON u.id = uf.follower_id WHERE u.del_flag = 0 AND uf.del_flag = 0
AND uf.followee_id = #{id}

SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS username, u.sex AS sex, u.following_count AS followingCount, u.follower_count AS followerCount FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN t_user_follow uf ON u.id = uf.followee_id WHERE u.del_flag = 0 AND uf.del_flag = 0
AND uf.follower_id = #{id}
